overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat walking through a dimly lit industrial sci-fi corridor toward a large red 'EUPHORIA' sign. Another character briefly joins and walks alongside before diverging to the right. The environment features metal grating floors, exposed pipes, and moody artificial lighting typical of a high-quality game engine render.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor entrance with overhead neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the metal grating corridor toward the illuminated EUPHORIA sign

entered.detail: large red geometric sign with stylized lettering hanging from the ceiling
thick metal pipes running vertically along the right wall
grid-patterned metal flooring covering the corridor ground
vertical fluorescent light strips mounted on the right wall
metal double doors with horizontal light bars above, beneath the sign
industrial equipment and crates stacked against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character in a white coat walking through a dimly lit industrial corridor. The environment features metal grating floors, exposed piping on the walls, and a prominent red 'EUPHORIA' sign hanging overhead. The character walks steadily toward a distant doorway beneath the sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with companion walking alongside

events.description: companion character enters from the left and begins walking alongside ego
companion character exits to the right and leaves the frame

agents.ego_description: walking forward as another character in dark clothing joins from the left, walks alongside briefly, then diverges toward the right

notable_agents.action: walking alongside ego from left side then peeling off to the right and exiting the frame

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, another figure enters from the left and walks alongside for a few seconds before diverging to the right and exiting the frame. The EUPHORIA sign grows larger as the camera approaches, and the industrial piping on the right moves closer to the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching industrial doorway beneath EUPHORIA sign

agents.ego_description: continuing the final approach toward the illuminated doorway beneath the sign, now walking alone

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character walks alone toward the industrial doorway beneath the now much closer EUPHORIA sign. The piping on the right recedes into the background as the doorway becomes the dominant feature in the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor that culminates in an approach toward a large, glowing red sign. It begins by trailing a character in a white coat walking across metal grating floors, with exposed piping lining the walls and a distant EUPHORIA sign hanging overhead. As the character advances, another figure emerges from the left to walk alongside briefly before diverging to the right and exiting the frame. The camera continues to push forward, causing the red sign to grow larger and the industrial piping on the right to shift closer to the foreground. Finally, the scene centers on the character walking alone toward a large industrial doorway as the surrounding pipes recede, leaving the doorway and the overhead sign as the dominant features of the frame.
